# Aura Teaching Context

## Curriculum Summary
- Subject: Mathematics
- Grade level: 10
- Topics: applications of trigonometry
- Learning goals: Understand applications of trigonometry; Apply applications of trigonometry with examples

## Core Concept List
- Trigonometry for height and distance
- Trigonometry for celestial distances
- Trigonometry for location finding
- Line of Sight
- Horizontal line through eye
- Angle of Elevation
- Trigonometric Ratios
- Measuring celestial distances
- Parallax angle definition
- Tangent ratio in right triangles
- Trigonometry for wall height
- Sine in right triangle
- Trigonometry for height calculation
- Trigonometry for slide length
- Trigonometry in air balloon
- Trigonometry for navigation
- Trigonometric Ratios Definitions
- Trigonometric ratios rules
- Shadow and height calculation
- Standard trigonometric angles
- Trigonometry problem-solving strategy
- Trigonometry application logic
- Curved Surface Geometry
- Right triangle setup
- Eye level measurement reference
- Trigonometry for height and distance
- Mathematical constant sqrt(3)
- Angle of elevation adjustment
- Trigonometry for height calculation
- River width calculation using trigonometry
- Trigonometry shadow problems

## Common Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Useful Analogies
- Tangent ratio in right triangles: Use the tangent (tan θ) ratio when a problem involves the Opposite and Adjacent sides.
- Trigonometry problem-solving strategy: Using standard trigonometric values helps students solve problems manually by focusing on the problem setup rather than complex calculations.

## Prerequisites
Use graph relations marked `requires` and nearby concept cards.

## Accessibility Notes
- Disability profile: adhd, dyslexia
- Pace: slow
- Preferred modality: mixed
- Keep text short, use concrete examples, and avoid visible scoring language.
